text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning. First, I drink a glass of water and do some light stretching. After a quick breakfast of oatmeal and fruit, I head to work. My job starts at 9, and I usually work until 5. Around lunchtime, I take a short walk to stay refreshed. In the evening, I exercise for about 30 minutes—either jogging or yoga. Then I cook dinner, read a book, or call a friend. I’m in bed by 10. This routine helps me feel consistent and productive every day.
